financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company did really well financially because its main business areas grew a lot.
They smartly used their money to focus on new and growing markets, which helped them earn more.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company is doing a good job managing risks, but political issues could still cause delays and extra costs.
They are keeping an eye on new technology and laws to avoid extra expenses and fines.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing a great job taking care of the environment and managing its leadership.
They are also good at supporting social causes, but there's room for improvement.

capital_structure.title: Capital Structure
capital_structure.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company is good at managing its money and doesn't rely too much on borrowing.
It has enough cash and resources to handle any financial needs without worry.

management_discussion.title: Management Discussion
management_discussion.label: Average
bullets: The report gives a clear picture of how the company is doing and its plans for the future.
The company is growing well, especially in its engineering and hydrocarbon businesses, which is a positive sign.

strategy.title: Strategy Overview
strategy.label: Excellent
bullets: The company has a clear plan with specific goals, especially in technology and energy, which helps it grow steadily.
There are some risks in relying too much on digital projects and working in other countries, but overall the strategy is strong.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: Larsen & Toubro is doing well because it's focusing on growing areas like infrastructure and energy, especially in booming regions like the Middle East and India.
The company is also investing in new technologies and green energy, which helps it stay strong and ready for future challenges.
